Goals: - Scalability - Reliability - Security - Maintainability
Notes: - Use Docker for all services - CI/CD with GitHub Actions - Logs → ELK Stack

API Gateway (Kong)

Monitoring (Prometheus + Grafana)

File Storage (S3)
